title: FCRI – Non-Technical Executive Support Staff – 11 Posts

basic_details.job_title: FCRI Non-Technical Executive Support Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Posts
basic_details.short_information: FCRI Recruitment 2026 offers 11 vacancies for Non-Technical Executive Support Staff posts. Eligible candidates with Any Graduate, Diploma, M.A can apply online from 05-05-2026 to 30-05-2026 through the official FCRI website, fcriindia.com.
basic_details.post_name: Non-Technical Executive Support Staff (ESS) - Post Codes: ESS1 to ESS6
basic_details.organization_name: Fluid Control Research Institute (FCRI) - Various Sections
basic_details.application_mode: Email only - MS Word Application Form to be emailed to [email protected] with subject line: NTA-EXEC SUPPORT

age_limit.age_details: Tenure Based Contract - initially 1 year, extendable up to maximum 3 years based on performance

selection_process: Level 1 & 2: Written Test / Skill Test + Interview | Level 3: Interview | Level 4: Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted by email only. Download the MS Word format Application Form from www.fcriindia.com/careers, fill it up completely (do not edit/revise the format or text), and email the filled MS Word Application Form - along with the included Declaration - to [email protected]. Only one application form will be accepted per applicant. Applications received by post, courier, or physical copy will be summarily rejected. CVs/Resumes will not be considered in lieu of the prescribed application form.
